final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, lagretberegnetareal AS area_m2, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, matrikkelnummertekst, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenummer = '5001' AND COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal,0) > 5000;

1.description: Select parcels in Trondheim with area > 5000 m2 (use kommunenavn filter)

2.description: Select quick-clay hazard areas with the 'high' risk class (inspection then filter)

3.description: Spatially join parcels (step 1) with quick-clay areas (step 2) using intersects

4.description: Retrieve municipality and county attributes for Trondheim by kommunenummer to attach names

5.description: Attribute join parcels from step 3 with municipality/county info from step 4 by kommunenummer (attribute join)

6.description: Aggregate/compute parcel areas and prepare final columns for sorting/limiting

7.description: Final sort and limit to top 10 parcels by area (use step tools for sort/limit)

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teigid, COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal,0) AS area_m2, kommunenummer, kommunenavn, matrikkelnummertekst, ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(omrade,4326)) AS geom_geojson
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE kommunenavn = 'Trondheim' AND COALESCE(lagretberegnetareal,0) > 5000;

1.description: Select parcels in Trondheim (kommunenummer) with area > 5000 m2, include geometry

2.description: Select quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, include geometry

3.description: Find parcels that intersect high-risk quick-clay areas

4.description: Get municipality to county mapping (kommunenummer -> fylkesnavn)
